userStories.title: Schema CashSession + server actions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a CashSession model that links an operator to a cash register for a work shift, so that each sale can be tied to a specific session.
acceptanceCriteria: CashSessionStatus enum: open | closed
CashSession model: id, cashRegisterId (FK), operatorId, operatorName, status, openedAt, closedAt?, openingBalance, closingBalance?, createdAt, updatedAt
CashRegister model gets cashSessions CashSession[] relation
src/lib/actions/cash-sessions.ts exports openCashSession, closeCashSession, getOpenSessions, getOperatorActiveSession
openCashSession validates cashRegister exists and operator has no open session already
closeCashSession validates session is currently open
getOperatorActiveSession returns the open session for a given operatorId or null
getOpenSessions returns all open sessions with cashRegister name
Each mutation calls revalidatePath('/caixas') and revalidatePath('/pdv')
Typecheck passes
Lint passes

userStories.title: Schema Sale + SaleItem + SalePayment + server action persistFinishedSale
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Sale, SaleItem, and SalePayment models in Prisma and a server action to persist a finished sale from the PDV engine to the database.
acceptanceCriteria: SaleStatus enum: open | finished | cancelled
PaymentMethod enum: cash | pix | debit | credit | store_credit
Sale model: id, sequence (autoincrement), code (VEN-XXXXXX computed), cashSessionId (FK), operatorId, operatorName, status, subtotal, discount, total, notes?, finishedAt?, cancelledAt?, createdAt
SaleItem model: id, saleId (FK), productId (FK), quantity Float, unitPrice Float, total Float
SalePayment model: id, saleId (FK), method PaymentMethod, amount Float
Product model gets saleItems SaleItem[] relation
CashSession model gets sales Sale[] relation
src/lib/actions/sales.ts exports persistFinishedSale
persistFinishedSale receives finished Sale object from sale-engine, creates Sale + SaleItems + SalePayments + StockEntry (type saida) per item in a single Prisma transaction
Typecheck passes
Lint passes

userStories.title: PDV redesign — novo layout visual
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the PDV to have a cleaner, denser layout so that I can find products faster and see the total at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Customer select removed from header entirely
Header shows: MARKETOPS PDV logo, session info, current time, link to Vendas
Product section: compact list rows
Total panel: total value shown at the TOP
Finalizar venda button is h-14
Typecheck passes
Lint passes

userStories.title: PDV gate de sessao — selecao ao entrar
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to select which cash register I am operating when I open the PDV.
acceptanceCriteria: On /pdv load, server component checks if logged-in operator has an active CashSession
If no active session: full-screen session gate modal shown
Typecheck passes
Lint passes

userStories.title: Conectar PDV ao banco — produtos, sessao e persistir venda
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the PDV to show real products from the database and persist completed sales.
acceptanceCriteria: PDV loads products from db.product.findMany (active only)
PosContent receives products: Product[] and cashSession: ActiveSession from server component as props
handleFinishSale calls persistFinishedSale server action
Typecheck passes
Lint passes

userStories.title: HelpRequest schema + server actions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a HelpRequest model that links a cash register to a help call.
acceptanceCriteria: HelpRequestStatus enum: active | attended | expired
HelpRequest model with expiresAt = createdAt + 60s
src/lib/actions/help-requests.ts exports createHelpRequest, attendHelpRequest, getActiveHelpRequests
Typecheck passes
Lint passes

userStories.title: PDV — Botao Chamar Supervisor com contagem regressiva
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a 'Chamar Supervisor' button in the PDV header.
acceptanceCriteria: Bell icon button in header, countdown 60s after click
Typecheck passes
Lint passes

userStories.title: Tela /supervisor — polling 4s, alarme sonoro, badge na aba
userStories.description: As a supervisor, I want a real-time screen showing active help requests.
acceptanceCriteria: Polling 4s, Web Audio alarm, document.title badge, cards with progress bar
Typecheck passes
Lint passes

userStories.title: Customer schema + server actions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Customer model for PF/PJ registration so that fiscal requests can be linked to a customer.
acceptanceCriteria: CustomerType enum: cpf | cnpj

Customer model: id, type CustomerType, document String @unique, name, tradeName?, email?, phone?, zipCode?, street?, number?, complement?, district?, city?, state?, ie?, active Boolean @default(true), createdAt
src/lib/actions/customers.ts exports createCustomer, updateCustomer, findCustomerByDocument, listCustomers
createCustomer validates document uniqueness before inserting
findCustomerByDocument returns Customer or null
listCustomers supports optional search string filtered on name OR document
toggleCustomerStatus sets active = !current
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Standalone — no FK dependencies on other new models. document field stores raw digits only (no mask). CPF = 11 digits, CNPJ = 14 digits — validation is caller responsibility.

userStories.title: Tela /supervisor/clientes — cadastro PF/PJ
userStories.description: As a supervisor, I want to register and manage PF/PJ customers so that I can link them to fiscal requests.
acceptanceCriteria: Route /supervisor/clientes: async server component lists customers from listCustomers()
CustomersContent client component receives customers as props + router.refresh() after mutations
Search input filters by name or document (debounced or form submit)
Table columns: Tipo (CPF/CNPJ), Documento (masked), Nome, Status, actions
Novo cliente button opens modal: select CPF or CNPJ, document input, name, tradeName (PJ only), email?, phone?
Edit icon opens same modal pre-filled (updateCustomer)
Toggle status chip calls toggleCustomerStatus
Middleware: /supervisor/clientes already covered by /supervisor prefix in ROLE_ROUTES
Sidebar: 'Clientes (NF)' item gets href '/supervisor/clientes'
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-015. Follow same pattern as /admin/usuarios: server component + client content + modal. Document display: format CPF as XXX.XXX.XXX-XX, CNPJ as XX.XXX.XXX/XXXX-XX in the table (display only, store raw).

userStories.title: CompanySettings schema + /admin/configuracoes + Product NCM/CFOP/CST
userStories.description: As an admin, I want company settings stored in the database and editable, and products to have NCM/CFOP/CST fields for NF-e.
acceptanceCriteria: CompanySettings model: id @default('default'), razaoSocial, cnpj, ie?, address, number, district, city, state, zipCode, phone, nfeSerie String @default('1'), nfeSequence Int @default(1), updatedAt @updatedAt
Product model: add ncm String? @default(null), cfop String? @default('5102'), cst String? @default('400')
Seed: upsert CompanySettings with id='default' and placeholder values
src/lib/actions/company-settings.ts exports getCompanySettings, updateCompanySettings
Route /admin/configuracoes: async server component with form to update company settings (razaoSocial, cnpj, ie, address fields, nfeSerie)
Middleware: /admin/configuracoes accessible to admin only (already in ROLE_ROUTES via catch-all not needed — add it)
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: CompanySettings uses @id with fixed value 'default' — single-row config table (upsert pattern). nfeSequence is incremented inside completeFiscalRequest in US-018.

userStories.title: FiscalRequest schema + server actions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want FiscalRequest model and server actions to create and complete mock NF-e requests.
acceptanceCriteria: FiscalRequestStatus enum: pending | processing | completed | cancelled

FiscalRequest model: id, saleId String (not FK — avoids circular), saleCode String, customerId?, document, customerName?, status FiscalRequestStatus @default(pending), nfeKey?, nfeNumber?, operatorId, supervisorId?, createdAt, updatedAt
src/lib/actions/fiscal-requests.ts exports createFiscalRequest, completeFiscalRequest, cancelFiscalRequest, getPendingFiscalRequests
createFiscalRequest validates saleId not already linked to a pending/completed request
completeFiscalRequest: fetches CompanySettings, increments nfeSequence, generates nfeKey (44 random digits), generates nfeNumber from nfeSequence, updates FiscalRequest to completed
getPendingFiscalRequests returns all where status === 'pending' ordered by createdAt asc
Each mutation revalidatePath('/supervisor') and revalidatePath('/pdv')
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-017. saleId stored as string (no FK) to avoid circular dependency between Sale and FiscalRequest. nfeKey = 44-char string of random digits (mock). nfeNumber = serie + '-' + nfeSequence.toString().padStart(6, '0'). completeFiscalRequest uses db.$transaction to atomically increment nfeSequence and update FiscalRequest.

userStories.title: Fluxo NF no PDV — modal CPF/CNPJ + fila NF no supervisor
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to optionally attach a CPF/CNPJ to a sale for NF-e, and as a supervisor I want to see and emit the NF-e queue.
acceptanceCriteria: PDV: 'Emitir NF' button visible next to 'Finalizar venda' when balance === 0 (sale is payable)
Clicking 'Emitir NF' opens modal: document input (CPF or CNPJ), lookup existing customer by document, 'Sem NF' option, 'Solicitar NF-e' option
Solicitar NF-e: calls handleFinishSale then createFiscalRequest with saleId, saleCode, document, customerId? (if found), customerName?
Sem NF: closes modal — no NF created
Supervisor screen: NF queue section below help requests showing pending fiscal requests
Each NF ticket shows: saleCode, document, customerName?, total from saleCode lookup
Supervisor 'Emitir NF' button calls completeFiscalRequest, shows nfeKey + nfeNumber in success modal
Success modal has 'Imprimir DANFE' button that opens printable HTML page in new tab
cancelFiscalRequest button on each ticket
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-018. DANFE is a printable HTML page (window.open + document.write) — no PDF library needed. NF queue in supervisor is a section below the help-request cards, same polling 4s. 'Emitir NF' in PDV is a separate button from 'Finalizar venda' — it finalizes AND creates FiscalRequest.
